description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, angular body with a green and yellow color scheme accented by black and metallic details. It is equipped with four large, deeply treaded tires designed for maximum traction on rough surfaces, making it suitable for urban and off-road environments. The vehicle's chassis sits low between the oversized wheels, suggesting a high ground clearance and stability. The front end is characterized by a reinforced bumper and a central grille, while the rear includes a prominent skid plate and exhaust details. The top of the vehicle displays a compact cockpit area, likely for a single occupant, with visible mechanical components and protective elements. The overall design emphasizes durability, maneuverability, and aggressive styling typical of high-performance all-terrain vehicles.
description: A rugged, green and yellow all-terrain vehicle with four large, knobby tires and a compact, reinforced body designed for urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reinforced bumper, central grille, and the aggressive stance of the four oversized tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the vehicle's low-slung chassis, large wheel arches, and visible suspension components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the prominent skid plate, exhaust details, and the wide track of the tires.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the tire tread and the streamlined, armored body.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires feature a knobby, blocky all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves and raised lugs, optimized for traction on both urban and off-road surfaces.
